description: CompositionWhite T-shirt for men with a V-neck, made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves with black mesh cuffs, black meshed panels on the sides, mesh panel on the back above the hem and nike swoosh appliquéd on the right chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned for training needs, this nike T-shirt is made of polyester fabric with Dri-Fit technology to offer absolute sweat-free, fresh comfort. Such properties make it ideal not just for training, but playing any sport even on a hot day. Team this with performance shorts and sports shoes, or tracks and floaters for unparalleled cool.
